star_3.text: somewhat good game, really damn hard to control a jet and a rocket, keeps crashing and saying 502 bad gateway, some of the skins won't load, needs more updates, it's like the developers abandoned this game, it's honestly disappointing. I love it though.

It's great — however, the game lacks many QOL features. Autopilot should've trimmed the plane too, and this is glaringly obvious when exiting AP and going into manual control as the plane will nosedive. Spawning on approach should've configured the plane for landing, but no. Approach spawn is, more often than not, too steep despite the existence of ILS. It's hard to take this game seriously as a sim. It's a fun novelty though.

star_5.text: This is an amazing game. The graphics are really good and there is a variety of aicraft and places so you can go to new York city for instance by just flying there! I only have two spots where this game can improve though, please add more controls like components on the aircraft for example the engines, lights and wind screen wipers and pls make the control for the rudder and the airealon separate. Second of all please add real sounds for example terrain, wind shear and stall.

fun, practical, and addicting. I love this game it includes all you need in a flight sim, and it's FREE satellite terrain, tons of free real life aircrafts, many options and things to do tbh, you will not be bored in this game. but there are minor problems. like it loads quite long and sometimes the aircraft takes to long to load so I crash, and it's heavy put it on max graphics and your phone is going to explode, lacks a bit of graphics but good modeling of the planes and terrain.

I really love this game even thought there is a better one. I just love that there is multiple and extra planes on the community contributed, the water effects were good too. If GeoFS company made the next upgrade, all planes have infinite liveries and create our own liveries, that would be awsome and more playable. When we click the aircraft bar, some commercial airplanes had a lots of liveries and also "create your own livery" button, I just wish like that, I hope GeoFS would do that, please.
the graphics, so good, everything is perfect. but it would be good if fuel decreased, and you had to fill it up, maybe some part of the plane breaks down, and if you crash, the plane explodes

super fun sim no words. it includes everything you need in a FREE flight sim no membership no premium everything, it has amazing choices of planes and the community contributed ones are so cool but I would love you to add the piaggo p180 avanti Evo it's one of my favorite planes and I would also report a problem. the runway is always elevated like one part of it and I just phase into it like it's annoying for me as it breaks my mood for it but awesome game love it.
